instruction: Talk to Klaus at the Vernworth Vocation Guild.
Talk to Roderick at the smithy for the stolen weapons lead.
Find the Two-Hander greatsword in Trevo Mine.
Find the Grievous Horns archistaff in Trevo Mine.
Return to Klaus with the recovered weapons.
Talk to Sigurd and ask about his fighting style.
Talk to Luz at the Reverent Shrine.
Complete the quest chain and talk to Cliodhna.
Give Lamond the required Newt Liqueur.
